privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims in task.json are verified and accurate. The task uses entirely synthetic data generated programmatically during setup: (1) An input ODT document (NeuroStim_SRS.odt) created using Python odfpy with 5 requirement headings (REQ-SYS-01 through REQ-SYS-05); (2) A trace data JSON file containing 5 mappings between requirements and verification protocols (VP-055, VP-056, VP-088, VP-012, VP-099); (3) An expected output file path (NeuroStim_SRS_v2.odt) where the agent must save the modified document with an added Verification Traceability Matrix table. The five requirements are: Pulse Width Accuracy (±5% accuracy requirement), Battery End-of-Life Indicator (5 kOhm impedance threshold), Wireless Telemetry Range (2 meters bidirectional), Hermetic Sealing Integrity (helium leak rate <1.0×10⁻⁹ std cc He/sec), and Emergency Stop Function (immediate stimulation cessation). All verification methods are realistic: Bench Test, Analysis, Field Test, Helium Leak Test, and Safety Inspection.
